name: @modelcontextprotocol/server-postgres
description: Official Anthropic MCP server for PostgreSQL — read-only SQL queries and schema inspection for AI agents

mcp_tools.name: query
mcp_tools.description: Execute a read-only SQL SELECT query

risk_assessment.network_scope: single database host — connection string provided at startup
risk_assessment.data_exfiltration_risk: high — agent can read ALL tables the DB user can access; use a read-only DB user
risk_assessment.sandbox_escape_risk: very-low — no subprocess spawning; pure SQL over pg driver
risk_assessment.notes: CRITICAL: connect with a read-only Postgres role. Avoid superuser or table-owner credentials.

security_flags.title: No write-protection at server level
security_flags.detail: Server does not enforce read-only mode in code; safety depends entirely on DB user privileges. Misconfigured credentials allow INSERT/UPDATE/DELETE/DROP.
security_flags.recommendation: Create a dedicated read-only Postgres role: GRANT CONNECT ON DATABASE mydb TO readonly_user; GRANT SELECT ON ALL TABLES IN SCHEMA public TO readonly_user;
